title: CNBC Daily Open: The great tech retreat
summary_full: Silicon Valley's sell-off gathers speed in Asia, with chip-heavy indices bearing the brunt of the declines, while tensions in Iran send oil prices higher.
summary_public: Silicon Valley's sell-off gathers speed in Asia, with chip-heavy indices bearing the brunt of the declines, while tensions in Iran send oil prices higher.
